name: viking
description: Floating AI coding assistant for macOS and Windows
author: omavashia

scripts.start: npm run build && concurrently "npm run watch" "electron . --viking-dev"
scripts.watch: concurrently "esbuild electron/main/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --external:electron --external:electron-updater --outfile=dist/main.js --format=cjs --watch" "esbuild electron/main/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --external:electron --outfile=dist/preload.js --format=cjs --watch" "esbuild electron/renderer/renderer.tsx --bundle --outfile=dist/renderer.js --watch --loader:.js=jsx --define:process.env.NODE_ENV='\"development\"'" "tailwindcss -i electron/renderer/styles.css -o dist/tailwind.css --watch"
scripts.build: esbuild electron/main/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --external:electron --external:electron-updater --outfile=dist/main.js --format=cjs && esbuild electron/main/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --external:electron --outfile=dist/preload.js --format=cjs && esbuild electron/renderer/renderer.tsx --bundle --outfile=dist/renderer.js --loader:.js=jsx --define:process.env.NODE_ENV='"development"' && tailwindcss -i electron/renderer/styles.css -o dist/tailwind.css
scripts.pack: npm run build && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --dir --publish never
scripts.pack:mac: npm run build && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --dir --mac --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist: npm run build && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --mac --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --win --x64 --publish never
